Solutions

Structured systems for B2B growth

We connect strategy, data, CRM, automation, outbound and conversion into a measurable architecture.

Design my system Solutions
Data modelclean
Pipelinevisible
Automationcontrolled

Diagnosis

The problem: growth activity without operating structure

Campaigns, CRM, outbound, automation and reporting often grow in separate layers. The result is activity that looks busy but does not produce clear pipeline decisions.

  • Disconnected tools
  • Unclear lead ownership
  • Weak lifecycle stages
  • Reports that do not explain next actions

Architecture

Overview: one system behind marketing and sales

Rotata creates the shared architecture that connects acquisition, data, CRM, automation, sales handoff, reporting and optimization.

  • Strategy
  • Data
  • CRM
  • Automation
  • Outbound
  • Conversion
  • Reporting

System

Systems we design

Each system is designed around the same sequence: tool to system to outcome.

CRM operating system

Data model, properties, lifecycle stages, pipeline views and dashboards.

Acquisition system

SEO, content, lead generation and conversion paths connected to CRM.

Outbound system

Targeting, signals, sequences, messaging and performance tracking.

RevOps system

Shared definitions, handoffs, automation and business reporting.

Architecture

Services

Rotata can diagnose, design, implement and optimize the system depending on the maturity of your current setup.

  • Growth system audit
  • HubSpot implementation
  • Data and targeting architecture
  • Outbound implementation
  • Dashboard and reporting design
  • Content and lead generation engine

Platforms

Tools

Tools are selected because they support the architecture, not because the tool itself is the product.

HubSpot

CRM, marketing automation and reporting

Explore

ZoomInfo

B2B data intelligence and account targeting

Explore

La Growth Machine

Multichannel outbound sequencing

Explore

Synapsale

Account engagement signals and prioritization

Explore

Process

Process

We move from diagnosis to implementation through controlled phases so the system stays understandable.

  1. Diagnose
  2. Design
  3. Implement
  4. Measure
  5. Optimize

Measurement

Outcomes

The goal is pipeline clarity: better data, cleaner handoffs, stronger prioritization and decisions that can be defended.

  • Cleaner CRM
  • More visible pipeline
  • More useful reporting
  • More consistent sales follow-up
  • Better account prioritization

Rotata
